prestazioni: Replace the original 1.8L Coventry Climax FWA engine (or Ford 109E inline-4 in later models) with a fully built **Ford Cosworth YB 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 (engine code: YBB)**, featuring forged internals (CP pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger**, and a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** for precise boost control. Pair with a **Holley HP EFI system** and **Motec M150 ECU** for standalone engine management, tuned to 350+ hp on E85 fuel with a **Pectel SQ6M lambda controller** for air-fuel monitoring.

Upgrade the Grantura’s rear-wheel-drive chassis with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (80% lock) in a **TVR-specific bellhousing adapter** to mate the YB engine to the original 4-speed manual gearbox (or a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed** for later models). Install **AP Racing CP5200 2-piece brake calipers** with **330mm slotted rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for improved stopping power, paired with **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.

Replace the factory leaf-spring rear suspension with a **custom-fabricated multi-link setup** using **Ohlins TTX40 coilovers** (adjustable damping and ride height) and **polyurethane bushings from SuperPro** (part #SPF0114K). Up front, retain the original double-wishbone geometry but upgrade to **Eibach ERS race springs** (1000 lb/in) and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (22mm front, 18mm rear) to reduce body roll. Reinforce the chassis with **TVR-specific subframe braces from RML Group** to handle increased power.
estetica: Replace the Grantura’s fiberglass body panels with **carbon fiber replicas from Fibretech Motorsport**, including a **custom widebody kit** (inspired by the TVR Griffith 200) to accommodate 17x8.5 ET20 front and 17x10 ET30 rear **BBS RS-GT wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires** (225/45 front, 275/40 rear). Add **custom aluminum side-exit exhaust tips** (fabricated by **Jet-Hot Coatings**) with a **ceramic-coated 3-inch stainless steel system** from **MagnaFlow**.

Install a **custom front splitter and rear diffuser** from **Aeroform Composites**, designed using CFD analysis to reduce lift by 30% at 100 mph. Pair with a **fixed carbon fiber rear wing** (adjustable angle, 3D-printed airfoils) from **9 Lives Racing**, mounted on **aluminum pedestals** to clear the Grantura’s sloped roofline. Replace the original pop-up headlights with **custom LED projector units** (Hella 500 series) housed in **carbon fiber buckets** for a modernized look.

Strip the interior and refit with **full Alcantara upholstery from Katzkin**, including a **custom-stitched dashboard overlay** to match the original 1960s TVR design. Install **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (with TVR-specific mounting brackets) and a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm diameter, suede grip). Add a **digital dash from AIM MXS Strada** (with CAN bus integration for the Motec ECU) and **custom aluminum pedal covers** from **Wilwood** for a race-inspired cockpit.
